response.justification: While Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with proven experience shipping products at scale and a strong commitment to engineering excellence, he does not meet critical minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ programming experience; the resume shows approximately 1-2 years from 2014-2015 plus minimal hobby work. More significantly, the role focuses on leading a cloud compute platform, but the resume demonstrates primarily web/application development background with only modest cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and no evidence of leading large-scale cloud platform engineering teams.
strengths: Proven polyglot developer who successfully ships products across web, mobile, and infrastructure—demonstrates ability to master new technology stacks rapidly
Clear commitment to engineering excellence through TDD, software craftsmanship, and mentoring—organizes refactoring dojos and teaches workshops on advanced topics
Real-world experience with distributed systems at scale, having worked on infrastructure handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~1-2 years in 2014-2015) and outdated, falling far short of the required 8 years as a minimum qualification
Background is predominantly web and application development rather than systems/infrastructure—no demonstrated expertise in compute platform architecture, DevOps infrastructure, or hardware systems
Recent career gap (October 2025–present) and limited evidence of technical leadership or mentoring at the scale required for a mid-senior technical lead role on a critical platform

key_factors.factor: Software engineering craftsmanship and learning ability
